what_it_does: Defines an inline SVG icon: a thin stroked circular outline containing an information-style mark.
observations: Uses a 24 by 24 viewBox with no fill.
Strokes use currentColor, 1.5 width, round line caps, and round line joins.
Draws the outer icon with a circle centered at 12,12 with radius 9.
Draws the inner mark as one path containing a rectangular stem and a short vertical upper mark.
standouts: Single compact SVG element with circle and path primitives.
The inner information mark is represented by stroked path geometry rather than text.
conventions: Follows common icon SVG conventions: 24px coordinate system, fill none, currentColor stroke, rounded stroke styling.
Uses inline SVG primitives without external dependencies or IDs.
notes: This file is a self-contained thin outline information-circle icon asset.
questions: Is the rectangular inner stem intentionally outlined rather than a single vertical stroke?
Is the short vertical upper mark intended to read as the information dot?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches the filename: it draws a thin outlined information-circle icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable, theme-color-aware information icon with a light stroke weight.
novelty: The inner information mark uses a closed rectangular path for the stem while the SVG has fill set to none.
contribution: Contributes a compact, color-inheriting SVG information icon with simple geometric primitives and thin outline styling for use in a fused design asset set.
summary_for_embedding: A self-contained 24x24 SVG info-circle icon using currentColor strokes, a circular outline, and a path-drawn information mark.
intention_for_embedding: This was for representing an informational UI affordance as a lightweight, themeable, thin-stroke vector icon.
